'''Ansek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Ansek system/Legends|Ansek system]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Ansek was created for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], ''[[The Politics of Contraband]]'', published in [[1992]]. Its system was later listed in a coordinates chart in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Free Time|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
